title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Axe India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Axe India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Category Manager with drive and ambition, Axe India in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Axe India:
Axe India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axe India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
